introSection: Giant Dipper is a steel launched roller coaster at Lotte World Adventure Busan - Magic Forest in Gijang, Busan, South Korea. It is a mirror clone of Blue fire Megacoaster at Europa Park.
fullText: Giant Dipper is a steel launched roller coaster at Lotte World Adventure Busan - Magic Forest in Gijang, Busan, South Korea. It is a mirror clone of Blue fire Megacoaster at Europa Park.
